title: Data Lab
subtitle: Custom indicator combinations, correlation analysis, and historical backtesting.

charts.networkNoData: Insufficient historical data to generate network
charts.matrixNoData: Insufficient historical data to generate correlation matrix
charts.networkHint: Node size represents current risk score; line thickness and color represent positive/negative correlation strength (green positive / red negative).

backtest.title: Historical Scenario Backtest
backtest.hint: The full version will support selecting historical events as starting points and comparing drawdowns/returns across strategies.
